phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Metro Line D tracks are
phrases.text_local: Onde ficam os carris da Linha D do metro?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuhng OOSH kuh-REESH DUH LEE-nyuh DEH DOO MEHT-roo?
phrases.cultural_note: The metro shares the lower deck with vehicular traffic.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, circulam no piso inferior.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, see-ruh-KOO-luhng NOO PEE-zoo een-fih-REEOHR.
likely_response.translation_en: Good day, they run on the lower deck.

responses.english: Good day, they run on the lower deck.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, see-ruh-KOO-luhng NOO PEE-zoo een-fih-REEOHR.
responses.french: Bom dia, circulam no piso inferior.

phrases.text_local: Como faço para encontrar as vias do Metro da Linha D aqui na ponte?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo FAH-soo PUH-ruh ayng-koongt-RAHR UHSH VEEUHSH DOO MEHT-roo DUH LEE-nyuh DEH uh-KEE NUH POHNG-tih?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Linha D do metro. Se precisar de ajuda, fale com um segurança da ponte ou um funcionário do metro.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH LEE-nyuh DEH DOO MEHT-roo. SIH prih-see-ZAHR DIH uh-ZHOO-duh, FAH-lih KOHM OONNG seh-goo-RAHNNG-suh DUH POHNG-tih OHW OONNG foonng-seeoo-NAHR-yoo DOO MEHT-roo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs for Metro Line D. If you need help, speak to a bridge security guard or a metro attendant.

responses.english: Follow the signs for Metro Line D. If you need help, speak to a bridge security guard or a metro attendant.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH LEE-nyuh DEH DOO MEHT-roo. SIH prih-see-ZAHR DIH uh-ZHOO-duh, FAH-lih KOHM OONNG seh-goo-RAHNNG-suh DUH POHNG-tih OHW OONNG foonng-seeoo-NAHR-yoo DOO MEHT-roo.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Linha D do metro. Se precisar de ajuda, fale com um segurança da ponte ou um funcionário do metro.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a estação de metro?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH shtuh-SOWN DIH MEHT-roo?

likely_response.local: A linha D do metro passa pelo tabuleiro superior da ponte. Siga as placas para a estação ou fale com um atendente do metro.
likely_response.pronunciation: AH LEE-nyuh DEH DOO MEHT-roo PAH-suh PEH-loo tuh-boo-LAY-roo soo-peh-REEOHR DUH POHNG-tih. SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH shtuh-SOWN OHW FAH-lih KOHM OONNG uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih DOO MEHT-roo.
likely_response.translation_en: Metro line D passes through the upper deck of the bridge. Follow the signs to the station or speak to a metro attendant.

responses.english: Metro line D passes through the upper deck of the bridge. Follow the signs to the station or speak to a metro attendant.
responses.phonetic: AH LEE-nyuh DEH DOO MEHT-roo PAH-suh PEH-loo tuh-boo-LAY-roo soo-peh-REEOHR DUH POHNG-tih. SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH shtuh-SOWN OHW FAH-lih KOHM OONNG uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih DOO MEHT-roo.
responses.french: A linha D do metro passa pelo tabuleiro superior da ponte. Siga as placas para a estação ou fale com um atendente do metro.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Cais da Ribeira ramp is
phrases.text_local: Onde está a rampa do Cais da Ribeira?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AH RAHNM-puh DOO KEYESH DUH ree-BAY-ruh?
phrases.cultural_note: The ramp connects the riverside directly to the bridge structure.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, começa junto aos barcos rabelo.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, koo-MEH-suh ZHOONNG-too UHOOSH BAH-ruh-koosh ruh-BEH-loo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good day, it starts near the rabelo boats.

responses.english: Good day, it starts near the rabelo boats.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, koo-MEH-suh ZHOONNG-too UHOOSH BAH-ruh-koosh ruh-BEH-loo.
responses.french: Bom dia, começa junto aos barcos rabelo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the lower vehicle deck is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o piso inferior para carros?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW PEE-zoo een-fih-REEOHR PUH-ruh KAH-roosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Vehicles and metro share this level, accessible via side ramps.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, situa-se abaixo da passarela.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, see-TOOUH-SIH uh-BEYE-shoo DUH puh-suh-REH-luh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good day, it is situated below the walkway.

responses.english: Good day, it is situated below the walkway.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, see-TOOUH-SIH uh-BEYE-shoo DUH puh-suh-REH-luh.
responses.french: Bom dia, situa-se abaixo da passarela.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to access the lower vehicle deck
phrases.text_local: Como acesso o piso inferior para veículos?
phrases.pronunciation: KOO-moo [link: moo-ah] ah-SES-soo [link: soo-oo] oo [link: oo-PEE] PEE-zoo [link: zoo-in] in-feh-REE-or [link: or-PA] PA-ha [link: ha-vee] vee-EE-koo-loos
phrases.cultural_note: Locals refer to the lower deck as the vehicular level, shared with the metro.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, desça pela rampa junto à Ribeira.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, DEHSH-suh PEH-luh RAHNM-puh ZHOONNG-too AH ree-BAY-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good day, use the ramp near Ribeira.

responses.english: Good day, use the ramp near Ribeira.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, DEHSH-suh PEH-luh RAHNM-puh ZHOONNG-too AH ree-BAY-ruh.
responses.french: Bom dia, desça pela rampa junto à Ribeira.

phrases.text_local: Como chego à rampa do Cais da Ribeira?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo SHEH-goo AH RAHNM-puh DOO KEYESH DUH ree-BAY-ruh?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a rampa do Cais da Ribeira.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH RAHNM-puh DOO KEYESH DUH ree-BAY-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Cais da Ribeira ramp.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Cais da Ribeira ramp.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH RAHNM-puh DOO KEYESH DUH ree-BAY-ruh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a rampa do Cais da Ribeira.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the upper pedestrian deck access is
phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è l'accesso al ponte superiore pedonale?
phrases.pronunciation: skoo-ZEE, DOH-vih luh-SEH-soo AHL POHNG-tih soo-peh-REEOH-rih peh-doo-NAH-lih?
phrases.cultural_note: The upper deck is pedestrian-only and offers stunning views of the Gaia wine cellars.

likely_response.local: Dalle rampe di Cais da Ribeira.
likely_response.pronunciation: DAH-lih RAHNM-pih DEE KEYESH DUH ree-BAY-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: From the Cais da Ribeira ramps.

responses.english: From the Cais da Ribeira ramps.
responses.phonetic: DAH-lih RAHNM-pih DEE KEYESH DUH ree-BAY-ruh.
responses.french: Dalle rampe di Cais da Ribeira.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Metro Line D tracks are
phrases.text_local: Onde estão os carris do Metro D?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ihsh-TOWN OOSH kuh-REESH DOO MEHT-roo DEH?
phrases.cultural_note: Metro Line D crosses the bridge on the upper deck, sharing space with pedestrians.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Gaia wine cellars view is
phrases.text_local: Onde se avistam as caves de vinho de Gaia?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH uh-VEESH-tuhng UHSH KAH-vihsh DIH VEE-nyoo DIH GEYEUH?
phrases.cultural_note: The cellars are visible across the river when facing Vila Nova de Gaia.

likely_response.local: Siga para o tabuleiro superior e pergunte a um segurança.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh PUH-ruh AW tuh-boo-LAY-roo soo-peh-REEOHR EH peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG seh-goo-RAHNNG-suh.
likely_response.translation_en: Go to the upper deck and ask a security guard.

responses.english: Go to the upper deck and ask a security guard.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh PUH-ruh AW tuh-boo-LAY-roo soo-peh-REEOHR EH peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG seh-goo-RAHNNG-suh.
responses.french: Siga para o tabuleiro superior e pergunte a um segurança.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Metro Line D tracks are
phrases.text_local: Onde ficam os carris do Metro da Linha D?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuhng OOSH kuh-REESH DOO MEHT-roo DUH LEE-nyuh DEH?
phrases.cultural_note: The Dom Luís I Bridge has two decks; the upper deck carries both pedestrians and the metro Line D tracks.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the upper pedestrian deck is
phrases.text_local: Onde está o deck superior para peões?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AW DEHK soo-peh-REEOHR PUH-ruh PIHOHNYSH?
phrases.cultural_note: The upper deck is exclusively for pedestrians and offers panoramic views.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, encontra-se no nível superior.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, ayng-KOHNGT-ruh-SIH NOO NEE-vehl soo-peh-REEOHR.
likely_response.translation_en: Good day, it is located on the upper level.

responses.english: Good day, it is located on the upper level.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, ayng-KOHNGT-ruh-SIH NOO NEE-vehl soo-peh-REEOHR.
responses.french: Bom dia, encontra-se no nível superior.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find the Gaia wine cellars view
phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove si vede le cantine di Gaia?
phrases.pronunciation: skoo-ZEE, DAW-vih SEE VEH-dih LIH kahnng-TEE-nih DEE GEYEUH?
phrases.cultural_note: The Gaia wine cellars are visible from the upper pedestrian deck of Dom Luís I Bridge, offering a panoramic view of the Vila Nova de Gaia riverfront.

likely_response.translation_en: On the upper deck, south side.

responses.english: On the upper deck, south side.
